note: Single source of truth for token pricing used by the token-usage recorder (hooks/record_token_usage.py) and the /architect:estimate-token-cost skill. Update `version` and the family prices when Anthropic pricing changes. Prices are per 1,000,000 tokens.

estimation_heuristics.note: Used by /architect:estimate-token-cost for a-priori (pre-run) estimates. Prefer measured actuals from work/token-usage.json when available.

code_ingestion_ratio.note: Fraction of the codebase actually read as body text (structural tools/sampling cover the rest).

effective_input_multiplier.note: Cache-adjusted billed input tokens per token of unique ingested content, across the whole multi-turn pipeline (context re-transmission minus prompt-cache reads at 0.1x).

output_per_phase_tokens.note: Rough per-phase report/reasoning output; scale by phase count.

phase_model_tier.note: Default model tier per phase from skill-dependencies.yaml; used to pick prices for a-priori estimates.
